# Project Timeline (Template)

Sent alongside the [`Proposal.md`](Proposal.md) or [`StatementOfWork.md`](StatementOfWork.md) — makes the schedule concrete rather than a vague "5-10 days."

---

**Project:** [Name]
**Kickoff date (on deposit clearing):**

| Phase | Duration | Target date | Client action needed |
|---|---|---|---|
| Kickoff / access handover | 1 day | | Provide domain/hosting access, brand assets |
| Discovery questionnaire | 2–3 days | | Return completed questionnaire |
| Design / build | [X] days | | Available for feedback if asked mid-build |
| Milestone review (projects £2,500+) | 1–2 days | | Approve or request changes |
| Final build / polish | [X] days | | — |
| Client review (UAT) | 2–3 days | | Test thoroughly, confirm acceptance in writing |
| Launch | 1 day | | — |
| Training call | 30 min | | Attend walkthrough |

**Total estimated timeline:** [X business days from kickoff]

*Delays on the client's side (late feedback, missing content) shift this schedule accordingly — see [`StatementOfWork.md`](StatementOfWork.md) Section 7.*
